headline: 68% of Greg Abel's Berkshire Hathaway Portfolio Is Invested in Just 5 Stocks. Here's My Favorite of the Bunch.
summary: Of Berkshire Hathaway's five biggest stock holdings, one company stands above the rest thanks to a powerful business model that's built to compound for decades.
